description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a tough, urban appearance, featuring a prominent mohawk hairstyle and a stern facial expression. He wears a fitted brown leather jacket adorned with metallic spikes on one shoulder and two red patches, paired with a gray shirt underneath. His blue pants are slim-fitting and have white side stripes, with black knee pads strapped over them, suggesting a readiness for action or protection. The figure's footwear consists of heavy, black boots, adding to the rugged look. His hands are open and relaxed at his sides, and his overall build is lean and athletic. The character's attire and accessories evoke a punk or rebellious street style, making him stand out in an urban environment.
description: A tough-looking adult male with a mohawk, leather jacket with spikes, blue striped pants, knee pads, and black boots, exuding a punk street style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mohawk, facial features, spiked shoulder, red patches on the jacket, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mohawk, the protruding spikes, and the side stripes on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the mohawk, the brown jacket, and the knee pads strapped over the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the other profile, with the hand position and the side details of the pants and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: leather jacket with spikes, fitted shirt, slim pants with side stripes, knee pads
